name: Broccoli Sauce with Pasta Twists
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring twists of pasta to boil and sauté all the first four ingredients in the broth (add a little broth at a time) until tender about ten minutes.
2. Cover for a few minutes at the end of cooking.
3. Add 2 tablespoons flour to the canned skim milk and whisk together.
4. Slowly add this mixture to the cooked vegetables and broth, stirring constantly until thickened.
5. Pour over the twists.
